message:
fix: proper SVG/PNG file export, minimal MCP responses, remove pako

- Fix SVG/PNG render writing TS source code instead of actual image data
- Write SVG/PNG to disk in sdk.ts render() instead of only returning in result
- Only write sidecar .drawmode.ts for .excalidraw paths
- Return minimal MCP responses (URL string or file path only) to avoid context bloat
- Replace pako with Node built-in zlib.deflateRawSync for upload compression
- Fix Zig WASM SVG renderer: multiline tspan, text centering, XML escaping
- Increase WASM heap from 512KB to 1MB
